response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive full-stack experience (13+ years) with a strong focus on TypeScript, Node.js, and React, matching the primary stack requirements. His roles at re:cinq and Optilyz show direct relevance to enterprise tooling and AI-agent infrastructure. While his primary backend experience includes TypeScript and some Kotlin/Java, his secondary skills (Dlang, C/C++) and cloud/AWS CDK experience suggest adaptability to required stacks.
strengths: Proven full-stack expertise with TypeScript, Node.js, and React in enterprise environments
Strong AI-agent and cloud infrastructure experience (re:cinq, AWS CDK)
Demonstrated leadership in open-source projects and mentorship (GISCollective, workshops)
concerns: Primary backend stack leans heavily on TypeScript/JavaScript; limited Kotlin/Java experience in recent roles
Scattered employment history with multiple short-term roles (though many are senior positions)
Secondary stack includes Dlang and C/C++, which are less relevant to the required technologies
